name: Reaction Diffusion
description: A Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion simulation running entirely on the GPU in a GLSL TOP, with the previous state fed back each frame.

nodes.name: seed1
nodes.comment: Generates the Gray-Scott initial state: A=1 everywhere with sparse organic blobs of B

nodes.name: glsl1
nodes.comment: Gray-Scott update step (reads feedback as input 0)

parameters.name: seed_resmode
parameters.description: The seed GLSL TOP has no input, so it needs an explicit resolution; it propagates through the feedback loop to size the whole simulation.

glsl_uniforms.name: uFeed
glsl_uniforms.label: Feed Rate
glsl_uniforms.description: Gray-Scott feed rate — how fast chemical A is replenished. Lower values give sparser patterns.

glsl_uniforms.name: uKill
glsl_uniforms.label: Kill Rate
glsl_uniforms.description: Gray-Scott kill rate — how fast chemical B is removed. Tune alongside Feed Rate to shift between spots, stripes and mazes.

preview_description: Evolving coral / fingerprint-like organic patterns growing and dividing across the frame.
